zh.lifeSummary: 當Robertus Fullwood於1475年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾時，他的父親Richard Fullwood37歲，母親Agneta Hubbard de Baidon22歲。他於1499年與Margareta Mitton在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1532年在英國瓦維其可爾享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Fullwood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Midlands): habitational name from a lost place called Fulwood near Clay Hall in Tanworth in Arden, Warwickshire or from one or more of the other places so called, such as Fulwood in Ecclesall (Yorkshire), Fulwood (Lancashire), Fulwood in Sutton in Ashfield (Nottinghamshire), and Fullwood Farm in Hulland (Derbyshire). From Old English fūl ‘dirty, muddy’ + wudu ‘wood’.

variants.name: Fullard
meanings: In some cases possibly an altered form of German Vollert, Fullert, or Füllert: from the personal name Volhard, Vollhardt (from Old High German Volkhart, a compound of volc ‘tribe, people’ + hart ‘bold’).

nameMeanings.name: Robertus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the personal name Robert , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is also occasionally borne by Jews, presumably as an Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish surname.

variants.name: Robert
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

variants.name: Robers
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

variants.name: Roberds
meanings: English: variant of   Roberts  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Robarts
meanings: English (Bedfordshire and Hertfortshire): variant of   Roberts  .

en.lifeSummary: When Robertus Fullwood was born in 1475, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Fullwood, was 37 and his mother, Agneta Hubbard de Baidon, was 22. He married Margareta Mitton in 1499, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1532, in Warwickshire, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robertus Fullwood est né en 1475, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Fullwood, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Agneta Hubbard de Baidon, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margareta Mitton en 1499, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1532, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Robertus Fullwood(이)가 1475년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Fullwood(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Agneta Hubbard de Baidon(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1499년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 Margareta Mitton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1532년 영국 워윅실르에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robertus Fullwood родился в 1475 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Fullwood было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Agneta Hubbard de Baidon, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margareta Mitton в 1499 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1532 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.
